Let $f(x, y) = \dfrac{x+y}{2}, g(x, y) = \sqrt{xy}, h(x, y) =
\dfrac{2xy}{x+y}$, and let

$$ S = \lbrace (a, b) \in \mathbb{N} \times \mathbb{N} \mid a \ne b \text{ and } f(a,b), g(a,b), h(a,b) \in \mathbb{N} \rbrace, $$

where $\mathbb{N}$ denotes the positive integers. Find the minimum of $f$ over
$S$.
